name: Traditional Margarita
recipeIngredient: Kosher salt for rimming the glass (to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze a piece of lime over the rim of the glass and coat the entire rim with juice.
2. Dip the rimmed glass into the salt mixture on a plate, ensuring the rim is evenly coated.
3. Fill the glass with ice.
4. Add the tequila, triple sec, and lime juice to the glass.
5. Stir gently until well combined.
Yield: 1 Margarita
